Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/mutashabihat_data.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('parahs:', keys.length, 'first:', keys.slice\(0,3\), 'last:', keys.slice\(-3\)\); let total=0, pairs=0; for \(const k of keys\) { total += d[k].length; for \(const e of d[k]\) pairs += e.muts.length; } console.log\('totalEntries:', total, 'pairs:', pairs\); console.log\('sample:', JSON.stringify\(d['1'][0]\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('=== PAGINATION ==='\) print\(json.dumps\(data.get\('pagination',{}\), indent=2\)\) print\(\) print\('=== VERSE COUNT ==='\) print\(len\(data['verses']\)\) print\(\) for v in data['verses']: print\(f\\"Verse {v['verse_key']}: {len\(v['words']\)} words\\"\) for w in v['words'][:2]: print\(f\\" word pos={w['position']} line={w.get\('line_number'\)} page={w.get\('page_number'\)} code_v1={w.get\('code_v1','?'\)[:4]}... char_type={w.get\('char_type_name'\)}\\"\) ")
